entity.summary: Non-custodial high-performance derivatives exchange project for Solana, combining a dedicated execution layer, on-chain settlement, cross-margin accounts, liquidity vaults, and staged testnet and pre-deposit access ahead of broader public trading availability.
entity.notes: Classified limited rather than active because current first-party documentation and public surfaces establish an operating testnet, staged access, and Season 1 pre-deposits, while independently maintained TVL reflects deposited assets rather than equivalent evidence of broadly available live mainnet trading. HEI models BULK, BULK Exchange, the execution layer, vault, testnet, and pre-deposit surfaces as one entity.

evidence.title: BULK exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes BULK as a non-custodial derivatives exchange architecture for Solana with dedicated execution, on-chain settlement, cross-margin accounts, liquidity vaults, and staged testnet access.

evidence.title: BULK pre-deposit protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report non-zero TVL associated with BULK Season 1 pre-deposits. This corroborates current project and deposit activity but is not treated as proof of broadly available live mainnet exchange trading, supporting limited status.
